ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the movie on a scale of 1 to 10 */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief synopsis of the movie */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the director(s) of the movie */,
  "writer" TEXT /* Name of the writer(s) of the movie */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "trailer_count" INTEGER /* Number of trailers associated with the movie */,
  "awards_count" INTEGER /* Number of awards the movie has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Comedy, Action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Chosen username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, curator, consumer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewed movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1-10) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment by the user about the movie */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stats entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated movie */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the movie */,
  "downloads" INTEGER /* Number of downloads of the movie */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of times the movie has been favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_stats_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_languages" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the watchlist */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie on the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the watchlist is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_festivals" (
  "festival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each festival */,
  "festival_name" TEXT /* Name of the film festival */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the festival takes place */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date(s) of the festival */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the film festival */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the film festival's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("festival_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Picture, Best Director) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Name of the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trailers" (
  "trailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trailer */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated movie */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the trailer video */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the trailer */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the trailer has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the trailer has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the trailer has received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trailer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trailers_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is based */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the production company's website */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the production company was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_companies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "company_id")
)
